programme.title: ⭐⭐ 3.1m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

Should be rideable, though that crosswind will make for some interesting 1.2m sections.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With a 1.2m swell and onshore wind, today's Molhe Leste is a masterclass in paddling against futility.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.2m waves with onshore wind suggest a choppy session best suited for masochists or complete beginners.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 11s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.2m swell and onshore breeze suggests a bumpy ride, best suited for those who enjoy a vigorous washing machine simulation.
